payload.subject: Re: Reschedule needed
payload.body:
hi — thanks for the heads up. a few times that could work for us:

- tuesday, july 1 — morning or early afternoon
- wednesday, july 2 — anytime
- monday, july 7 — morning preferred

let me know what you have available and we'll confirm. thanks!

parsed.rationale: No calendar data was available in the memory slice, so proposed times are plausible alternatives around the cancelled July 3 date but must be verified by the parent before sending.
